cwuc.info.hachimi_disabled: The "Hachimi Glue" option is disabled on this server.
cwuc.info.train.occupied: Detected an unexpected occupation of a reserved signal segment. The reservation lock has been released.
cwuc.goggle.hose_pulley.cant_infinite: This fluid doesn’t support bottomless supply!
cwuc.goggle.hose_pulley.lower_hose: Sufficient fluid filled. Lower the hose for infinite extraction.
cwuc.config.common.qol.title: Quality of Life
cwuc.config.common.deployer_instant_outp: Fix deployers unnecessarily entering their 10-tick cooldown when milking, emptying buckets, slaughtering, etc.
Because the secondary output overflow check is always performed before the outputs are extracted.
cwuc.config.common.belt_funnel_detection: Allows funnels to extract items positioned exactly at the center of a belt.
Previously, funnels could only extract items past the center.
When a opposing funnel blocks items at the center, all side-facing belt funnels stop extracting, which is unintuitive.
cwuc.config.common.no_depot_overflow_dro: Prevent the depot from dropping overflow items.
For example when it accumulates too many processing outputs.
Or when an Ejector cannot merge received item stacks.
cwuc.config.common.better_psi_on_carriag: PSIs on trains are now only activated when the train arrives at a station.
cwuc.config.common.hachimi_glue.1: Make super glue as convenient as honey glue from Aeronautic.
cwuc.config.common.smart_fluid_pipe.1: Allow smart fluid pipes and valve pipes to work without being directly attached to a tank.
cwuc.config.common.easy_belt.1: Allow belts to operate without requiring a power source.
cwuc.config.common.fast_logistics.1: Optimize the performance of various logistics components.
cwuc.config.common.basin_faucet_view.1: Show the contents of the basin faucet when wearing Goggles.
cwuc.config.common.bugfix.title: Bugfix
cwuc.config.bugfix.hose_pulley_fix.1: Fix hose pulleys incorrectly showing "Bottomless Supply" and stopping fill 2 blocks before reaching the actual threshold;
cwuc.config.bugfix.hose_pulley_fix.2: Fix fluid input rates above 1000 mB/t to hose pulleys being incorrectly reduced;
cwuc.config.bugfix.hose_pulley_fix.3: Fix mechanical pumps with a full output deleting fluid when extracting from a hose pulley;
cwuc.config.bugfix.hose_pulley_fix.4: Add extra tooltip when wearing Goggles.
cwuc.config.bugfix.vault_and_tank_schema: Fix single-block tanks or vaults placed by schematic incorrectly have zero capacity.
cwuc.config.bugfix.fluid_network_fix.1: Backported the fix from Create PR #9974 and #10001;
cwuc.config.bugfix.fluid_network_fix.2: Fix open pipes being unable to place fluids when the output rate exceeds 1000 mB/t;
cwuc.config.bugfix.fluid_network_fix.3: Fix open pipes not validating their connections;
cwuc.config.bugfix.fluid_network_fix.4: Fix an issue where, when "mechanicalPumpRange" >= 16, long pipes may occasionally fail to rebuild their fluid network correctly after chunks are reloaded.
cwuc.config.bugfix.belt_fix.1: Backported the fix from Create PR #9891 and #9967;
cwuc.config.bugfix.belt_fix.2: Fix the issue where the outputs of belt processing machines will be pushed back to the input side by a blocked belt funnel;
cwuc.config.bugfix.processing_fix.1: Fix one of the two fluids output of a basin disappearing under certain conditions;
cwuc.config.bugfix.processing_fix.2: Fix recipe priority sorting not taking fluid ingredient amounts into account;
cwuc.config.bugfix.processing_fix.3: Fix basin recipe filtering only considering the first output of recipes with multiple outputs;
cwuc.config.bugfix.processing_fix.4: Fix sequenced assembly recipes using incorrect steps under certain conditions.
cwuc.config.bugfix.train_fix.1: Backported the fix from Create PR #9875 and #10362;
cwuc.config.bugfix.train_fix.2: Fix an issue where trains never release their reserved signal segment, causing a deadlock.
cwuc.config.common.misc.title: Misc
cwuc.config.misc.disable_dig_speed_penal: When players are in the air or water, they will no longer be subject to a five-time increase in digging time penalty
cwuc.config.misc.keep_flying_on_ground.1: Prevents players from automatically exiting flight mode when touching the ground.
cwuc.config.misc.heuristic_rotation.1: Allow rotation for blocks without a custom rotate implementation.
cwuc.config.misc.heuristic_rotation.2: Many mod authors do not override rotate and mirror when adding directional blocks.
cwuc.config.misc.heuristic_rotation.3: As a result, vanilla structure block placement and Create schematic printing are unable to correctly rotate these blocks.
cwuc.config.misc.heuristic_rotation.4: Enabling this feature automatically detects common facing properties and applies rotation/mirror.
